case_title: SCHIEFER, JOHN M. H. VS BEECROFT MARY LOUISE

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEECROFT MARY LOUISE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $941.01 FILED BY SCHIEFER, JOHN M. H. AS TO DEFENDANT BEECROFT MARY LOUISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,142.75 FILED BY BEECROFT MARY LOUISE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SCHIEFER, JOHN M. H. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-25-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT BEECROFT MARY LOUISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SCHIEFER, JOHN M. H. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO MARY BEECROFT, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE OUT OF COUNTY.
